svg.text: Full Greeks: delta, gamma, theta, vega
13 PUT SIGNALS — Sell Puts on Weakness/Fear
Single signal = always LOW. You need convergence. Earnings gate blocks new trades through earnings.

g.text: Volume Climax Up (3x vol, up day)

svg.text: Loss stop hit (2x monthlies, 1.5x weeklies) OR earnings before expiry ≤30 DTE
Moneyness-scaled: Deep OTM (|δ|<0.10) → 80% | Moderate → 50% | Near ATM → 40%
Time+IV boost: >50% captured + ≤45 DTE + IV rank >60 → take profit early
Earnings approaching (prescriptive: trigger price + action + dollar risk)
TV flipped bearish | Confirmed downtrend | IV collapsed
Thesis intact. TV consensus healthy. Trend confirmed.
Puts never roll UP | Calls never roll DOWN | Debit > premium → blocked | Stress tested
Go further OTM when IV is elevated

g.text: Vega cap: 2% NLV per 1pt IV move

svg.text: Real chain data from E*Trade when available; estimated otherwise
TradingView consensus adjusts: STRONG_SELL → SKIP, BUY → upgrade

g.text: AMZN -1x $230 put — Set alert at $242. Buy to close if hit.
Wash sale: 30 cal day block | LTCG: 365 day protection | NIIT 3.8%

svg.text: TARGET: 25-40% Annualized | Go-Live: WR ≥55%, HIGH WR ≥65%, Max DD <12%
Manual approval → Auto-close M3 → Auto-HIGH M4 → Auto-HIGH+MED M5+ | Telegram + Email delivery
